title: Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really?
authors_or_org: Lennart Purucker, Andrej Tschalzev, Nick Erickson, Gioia Blayer, David Holzmüller, Alan Arazi, Alexander Pfefferle, Mustafa Tajjar, Gaël Varoquaux, Frank Hutter
memory: Top 5 paper. Introduced BeyondArena and Data Foundry; 142-dataset benchmark for tabular foundation models across IID, temporal, grouped, text/high-cardinality, large/high-dimensional settings. Suppress arXiv, project page, HF dataset, code, benchmark reposts unless a materially new version appears.

title: A Causal Foundation Model for Structure and Outcome Prediction
authors_or_org: Max Zhu, Martino Mansoldo, Ching-Hao Wang, Stefan Groha
memory: Top 5 paper. TabPFN-CFM causal foundation model for structure and outcome prediction, supports observational/interventional/counterfactual queries and graph conditioning. Suppress future ICML/camera-ready/code reposts unless contribution materially changes.

title: A Mechanistic Study of Tabular Foundation Models
authors_or_org: Marin Biloš, James T. Wilson, Anderson Schneider, Yuriy Nevmyvaka
memory: Top 5 paper. Mechanistic analysis of tabular foundation models; attention-weighted voting, class-prototype readouts, permutation invariance sources, and mechanism-grounded attacks. Suppress future versions/discussions unless materially new experiments are added.

title: The Curse of Multiple Mediators: Hidden Interaction Effects in Activation Patching
authors_or_org: Sankaran Vaidyanathan, David Arbour, Aaron Mueller, Scott Niekum, David Jensen
memory: Top 5 paper. Recasts activation patching via causal mediation and shows natural indirect effects include interaction effects; GPT-2 IOI case study. Suppress future venue/code reposts unless substantially extended.

title: Unsupervised Causal Abstractions Discovery
authors_or_org: Théo Saulus, Simon Lacoste-Julien, Dhanya Sridhar
memory: Top 5 paper. Learns high-level causal abstractions from low-level measurements using low-rank causal discovery assumptions and identifiability results. Suppress future versions unless materially changed.
